Package nonprofitbookkeeping.preferences

Class PreferencesManager

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.preferences.PreferencesManager
public class PreferencesManager extends Object
Manages application-specific preferences using the Java Preferences API. This class provides static methods to get and set preferences, such as the last directory accessed by a file chooser.

This class previously used the same preference key for both the last directory and the last write directory. The keys are now distinct so that read and write dialogs can store independent values.

    static String

    Returns the last database file path that the user selected when opening or creating an H2 database.

    Gets the last directory path that was used by a file chooser specifically for write or save operations.

    Persists the path of the last opened or created database file so the application can offer it as the default location the next time the chooser is displayed.

  • Constructor Details

    • PreferencesManager

      public PreferencesManager()

  • Method Details

    • getLastDirectory

      public static String getLastDirectory()
      Gets the last directory path that was used by a file chooser for general purposes. If no directory preference is found, it defaults to the user's home directory.
      Returns:
      The last directory path as a String.

    • getLastWriteDirectory

      public static String getLastWriteDirectory()
      Gets the last directory path that was used by a file chooser specifically for write or save operations. If no preference is set, it defaults to the user's home directory.
      Returns:
      The last write directory path as a String.

    • setLastDirectory

      public static void setLastDirectory(String path)
      Sets the last directory path used by a file chooser for general purposes. This path is persisted for future sessions.
      Parameters:
      path - The directory path to store. If null, the behavior depends on the underlying Preferences implementation (may throw NullPointerException).

    • setLastWriteDirectory

      public static void setLastWriteDirectory(String path)
      Sets the last directory path used by a file chooser specifically for write or save operations. This path is persisted for future sessions.
      Parameters:
      path - The directory path to store. If null, the behavior depends on the underlying Preferences implementation (may throw NullPointerException).

    • getLastDatabasePath

      public static String getLastDatabasePath()
      Returns the last database file path that the user selected when opening or creating an H2 database. The stored value includes the file name, typically ending with .mv.db. If no preference has been stored this method returns null.
      Returns:
      the previously selected database file path, or null if none recorded.

    • setLastDatabasePath

      public static void setLastDatabasePath(String path)
      Persists the path of the last opened or created database file so the application can offer it as the default location the next time the chooser is displayed. Supplying a null or blank value clears the stored preference.
      Parameters:
      path - absolute path to the database file (usually ending in .mv.db).
